org.apache.paimon.predicate

Class LeafPredicate

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.predicate.LeafPredicate
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Predicate

    public class LeafPredicate
extends Object
implements Predicate
    Leaf node of a Predicate tree. Compares a field in the row with literals.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

        public boolean test(InternalRow row)
        Description copied from interface: Predicate
        Test based on the specific input row.

        test in interface Predicate
        Returns:
        return true when hit, false when not hit.

      • test

        public boolean test(long rowCount,
                    InternalRow minValues,
                    InternalRow maxValues,
                    InternalArray nullCounts)
        Description copied from interface: Predicate
        Test based on the statistical information to determine whether a hit is possible.
        Specified by:
        test in interface Predicate
        Returns:
        return true is likely to hit (there may also be false positives), return false is absolutely not possible to hit.

      • negate

        public Optional<Predicate> negate()

        negate in interface Predicate
        Returns:
